description_long: This is a small, traditional wooden canoe with a dark brown finish, featuring a gently curved hull and a flat bottom. The canoe has two visible bench-style seats and a central thwart for structural support, all crafted from the same wood as the hull. The gunwales run along the top edges, providing reinforcement and a place to grip or tie ropes. The bow and stern are slightly raised, giving the canoe a classic, symmetrical profile. The surface appears weathered and matte, suggesting frequent use or exposure to the elements. There are no visible registration numbers, handles, or additional accessories attached to the canoe.
description: A small, dark brown wooden canoe with two seats, a central thwart, and a weathered matte finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the canoe, the curvature of the hull, and both bench seats.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the bow, the width of the canoe, and the arrangement of the seats and thwart.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the hull's shape and interior seating.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stern, the interior layout, and the flatness of the bottom.
